implementation_plan: 1. Deploy drones and satellites for field imaging; 2. Apply AI image analysis to detect anomalies; 3. Alert farmers to pest or disease presence; 4. Track disease progression for management decisions.
expected_outcomes: High-accuracy detection of 500+ crop diseases and large-scale crop loss reduction.
datasets: Hyperspectral images, drone and satellite imagery, crop health records.
ai_tools_platforms: Resnet50, Convolutional Neural Networks (Cnn), Multispectral Imaging, Ai-Iot Smart Agriculture Pivot
digital_tools_platforms: Farmonaut Ai-Based Advisory, Cropx Soil Sensors And Telemetry, Eos Crop Monitoring Platform, Agmri Insights Crop Monitoring App
ai_frameworks: Tiny-Litenet, Resnet34, Random Forest, Pytorch
ai_tools_and_models: PlantCaFo, InsightNet, Smart Crop Care AI, Farmonaut AI-Based Advisory, ResNet50, DINO2, Multispectral Imaging
